overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia walking through a lush summer forest. The character follows a scenic riverside path lined with colorful wildflowers before turning into a denser wooded area.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along a grassy path beside a flowing river, surrounded by wildflowers and scattered trees

entered.detail: Clear flowing water with visible current running parallel to the path
Earthen and rocky cliff face rising from the water's edge with exposed soil
Dense patches of red poppies, purple lupines, and white daisies lining the trail
Large deciduous trees with full green canopies providing dappled sunlight

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a bright, sunlit riverside path through a lush summer meadow. A clear stream flows to the left while colorful wildflowers carpet the right side of the trail. The environment is open and vibrant with scattered trees providing partial shade over the grass path.

events.description: Geralt turns right away from the river and heads deeper into the forest
Environment shifts from open riverside meadow to enclosed forest with dense tree cover blocking the sky

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns away from the river and pushes through denser vegetation into the shaded woods

entered.detail: Thick bushes, ferns, and tall grass filling the spaces between closely spaced tree trunks
Large oak tree trunks surrounding the path closely on both sides

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the river at 25 seconds, Geralt enters a denser, more enclosed section of forest where the thick canopy blocks most of the sunlight. The environment shifts from open meadow to shaded woodland with thick undergrowth and closely spaced tree trunks replacing the riverside views.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open riverside meadow into the deep shadows of a dense forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a sunlit path where a clear stream flows to the left and colorful wildflowers carpet the right. As the path leads away from the water, the vibrant openness of the meadow gradually gives way to a more enclosed environment. The scene then shifts into a shaded woodland where a thick canopy blocks the sunlight, replacing the riverside views with closely spaced tree trunks and heavy undergrowth.
